title: LTTOMT SMP MODPACK
description: A Vanilla enhanced minecraft experience. Mostly focused on the origins and Enchancement mod in order to provide a unique new combat experience as well as biome and furniture mods. This modpack is used for the LTTOMT minecraft server.
body: A Vanilla enhanced minecraft experience. Mostly focused on the origins and Enchancement mod in order to provide a unique new combat experience as well as biome and furniture mods. Mainly focused on pvp rather than pve. This modpack is used for the LTTOMT minecraft server.
